_comment: BT30 Three Glorious Fighters — inherits Standard 24x12 defaults. Notable: this set introduces Secret Rare cards that ALSO have a God Rare parallel printing of the SAME card (e.g. 'Bulma, Opening Chapter' exists as both SCR and GDR productIds) — verified live 2026-07-05. No EV double-counting concern since each is a distinct priced productId in its own rarity bucket.
